name: Himchelate Animal Feed Supplement Improves Milk Production & Reproductive Health Mineral Mixture Powder (5kg)
description: Fortified with herbal actives Himalaya HimChelate is a specially formulated chelated minerals and vitamins supplement fortified with herbal actives for livestock. It provides the minerals required to manage stress, boost immunity, and improve production, reproduction, and udder health. Direction of Use Cows/Buffaloes: 30g per day per animal Horse/Camels : (Young Animals : 30g Per day Adult : 50g Per Day) Calves/Sheep/Goats: 15g per day per animal Pigs : Starter ; 10-15g Per Day Finishers : 15-20g Per Day Note: 1- 2kg of HimChelate should be mixed in 100kg of feed.
